## Checklist

- [ ] Change is focused and surgical (no unrelated refactors)
- [ ] `npm run lint` is clean
- [ ] `npm test` passes
- [ ] `npm run test:coverage` passes the gate (for `core` changes)
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes
- [ ] Docs/CHANGELOG updated if user-facing behavior changed
